seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: The email must include specific inquiries about the dates of the exhibitions.
new_constraint: The email must not inquire about the exhibition opening dates.

Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Exhibition Dates

Dear Art Gallery Team,

I hope this email finds you well. I am a frequent visitor to your gallery and am eager to continue enjoying the works of various contemporary artists represented here. I am writing to express my interest in scheduling a visit to view your recent projects and future displays.

Could you please provide the specific dates associated with your upcoming exhibitions? I would like to ensure my visit aligns correctly with the exhibition timelines.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>

final_answer:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Exhibition Dates

Dear Art Gallery Team,

I hope this email finds you well. I am a frequent visitor to your gallery and am eager to continue enjoying the works of various contemporary artists represented here. I am writing to express my interest in scheduling a visit to view your recent projects and future displays.

Could you please provide the specific dates associated with your upcoming exhibitions? I would like to ensure my visit aligns correctly with the exhibition timelines.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<|im_end|>
